Localization.Description: A user performed an action with a project team

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted team "{object.name}" in project {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed property "{object.property}" of project team "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created team "{object.name}" in project {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
